tests.title: Verify the security disclaimer is displayed upon opening the chat window
preconditions: The user is on a page where the chat widget is available
steps: Click on the chat widget icon to open the chat window
Observe the initial content of the chat window
tests.expected_result: A brief disclaimer warning against sharing credit card numbers, bank details, or financial data is visible.

tests.title: Verify the chat disclaimer is visible and rendered correctly on Safari
preconditions: The user is accessing the application using a Safari browser
steps: Check the visibility of the security warning message above the input box or as the first message
tests.expected_result: The security disclaimer is clearly visible and not obscured or missing in the Safari browser interface.

tests.title: Verify the disclaimer is present before any user input is entered
preconditions: The chat window is open and the input field is empty
steps: Observe the chat window interface before clicking into the text input box
Verify the presence of the security warning
tests.expected_result: The warning message is displayed to the user before they have the opportunity to start typing.

tests.title: Verify the disclaimer remains visible when forbidden characters are typed
preconditions: The chat window is open and the disclaimer is visible
steps: Click inside the chat input box
Type a sequence of forbidden or special characters
tests.expected_result: The disclaimer remains visible and its layout is not affected by the input of forbidden characters.

tests.title: Verify the placement of the disclaimer message matches requirements
steps: Verify if it is placed either as the first automated greeting or immediately above the text input box
tests.expected_result: The message is highly visible and correctly positioned according to the specified placement options.

notes: Includes regression testing for Safari visibility (AIP-11) and negative testing regarding input interaction (AIP-10).
